mapper.select: SELECT ar.role_code FROM ADMIN_USER_ROLES aur INNER JOIN ADMIN_ROLES ar ON aur.role_id = ar.role_id WHERE aur.admin_id = #{adminId} AND aur.deleted_yn = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE ADMIN_USERS SET login_fail_count = 0, locked_until = NULL WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AUDIT_LOGS ( actor_type_code, actor_id, action_type_code, target_type_code, target_id, description, ip_address, created_at ) VALUES ( #{actorType}, #{actorId}, #{actionType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ipAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
